property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\app\PC\product\21c\dbhomeXE\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Workstation\bin\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jre1.8.0_471\bin;;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;c:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\codeBin;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\PC\.dotnet\tools;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.2\bin;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\4.0\bin;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\Java\jre1.8.0_471\bin;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;.
